summary: Completed testing of Criminal Appeal AI Legitimacy Engine upgrade. All 12 backend tests pass. Fixed critical frontend bug in CompareCasesPage.jsx (setLoadingFactors useState destructuring). Legitimacy scoring, Case Readiness, user_id access control, and compare endpoints all working correctly.

issues: CaseStrengthMeter component exists but is not rendered in the UI - the Case Readiness Score is only available via API, not displayed in the Progress tab

action_items: Consider adding CaseStrengthMeter component to Progress tab to display Case Readiness Score visually
UNVERIFIED badge and AI-referenced note only appear when similar_cases are populated (after Investigate is clicked) - this is correct behavior but may need documentation
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: CompareCasesPage.jsx line 46 had incorrect useState destructuring: `const [setLoadingFactors] = useState(false)` should be `const [loadingFactors, setLoadingFactors] = useState(false)`
Legitimacy Engine correctly implements hard safety rule: no STRONG rating without evidence_score >= 2
Case Readiness endpoint correctly returns score_type='readiness' with labels Advanced/Progressing/Developing/Early Stage
Compare endpoints correctly renamed to /api/compare/patterns and /api/compare/case-composition with appropriate disclaimers
User_id access control properly enforced on PATCH endpoints for deadlines and checklist items

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Compare page fixed, all core features working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Legitimacy Engine upgrade verified: 1) GET /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds returns legitimacy_scores with legal_score, evidence_score, viability_score (0-3 each), total_score (0-9), rating, confidence_note. 2) GET /api/cases/{case_id}/strength returns score_type='readiness' with labels Advanced/Progressing/Developing/Early Stage. 3) Compare endpoints renamed to /api/compare/patterns and /api/compare/case-composition. 4) Fixed CompareCasesPage.jsx useState bug. 5) UNVERIFIED badge only shows when similar_cases array is populated (after ground investigation).

legitimacy_scores_in_grounds.details: All grounds have legitimacy_scores with legal/evidence/viability scores

legitimacy_engine_evidence.details: Correct scoring based on quote length

frontend_grounds_tab.details: Legitimacy Breakdown panel shows Legal/Evidence/Viability scores

frontend_compare_page.details: Fixed setLoadingFactors bug, Platform Patterns tab works

bug_fixed.issue: Incorrect useState destructuring: `const [setLoadingFactors] = useState(false)` caused 'setLoadingFactors is not a function' error
